_comment: Climate domain knowledge base — EPA, ASHRAE, and USEPA guidance standards. Sources cited per field.

tree_canopy_targets.source: EPA Heat Island Effect Mitigation Strategies (2023); American Forests Urban Tree Equity Score

green_space_cooling_threshold.source: EPA Heat Island Compendium (2008, updated 2023); USEPA

impervious_surface_limits.note: Higher impervious surface increases runoff volume and pollutant loading
impervious_surface_limits.source: EPA National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Phase II Small MS4 Guidance (2016)

green_infrastructure_targets.source: EPA Green Infrastructure Municipal Handbook (2008, updated 2021)

retention_requirement_inches.source: NOAA Atlas 14 precipitation frequency data used in local MS4 permits

per_capita_targets.source: National Recreation and Park Association (NRPA) Park Metrics 2023; UWOT (Urban Waters of the US)

ashrae_climate_zone_guidance.source: ASHRAE Standard 90.1-2022; EPA Climate Zone Map; DOE Building Energy Codes

parking_climate_impact.source: EPA Reducing Urban Heat Islands: Compendium of Strategies (2023); USEPA Parking Lot Design Guidance
